channel.title: Course on Sine's Site
channel.description: Recent content in Course on Sine's Site

item.title: TAGE Branch Predictor
item.description: Introduce the powerful branch predictor TAGE. I haven’t seen anyone writing related articles, probably going to read the papers. The TAGE predictor is called the TAgged GEometric history length branch predictor. Since the first appearance on CBP-2 in 2006, it has not left the championship list. The winners of several competitions are all variants of the TAGE predictor. The TAGE predictor is a PPM-like predictor, the biggest difference being the way the status is updated.
